name: enhanced-company-extraction
hypothesis: Implementing 6-stage fallback strategy with expanded Korean company database will improve company extraction rate from 80% to 90%
change: Expanded company database from 34 to 70+ companies, implemented 6-stage fallback strategy with advanced context-aware scoring, enhanced pattern matching for Korean/English company names
expected_improvement: Better coverage of all company types including global companies, research institutes, startups, and fintech companies
